# Production Blueprint

Use this structure when planning `production.md`.

## Minimum Sections
- `# Production: [Video Title]`
- `## Hook (0:00-0:30)`
- `## Section 1 ...`
- `## Section 2 ...`
- `## Takeaway ...`
- `## Pacing Notes`
- `## Dependencies`

## For Each Section
- Visual
- Overlay or on-screen text
- Screen recording or demo requirement
- Voiceover direction
- Why this section exists

## Quality Check
- The angle should fit at least one core content pillar from `_project/project-doc.md`
- The episode should feel useful to a busy working engineer within the first 30 seconds
- The hook should create tension, curiosity, or a strong point of view
- Each section should earn its place and move the argument forward
- Use real examples, TinqrBox, or actual tooling when that raises credibility
- Avoid stacking three similar beats in a row
- Dependencies should be concrete enough that recording and editing can start
